#  [Apache Flink 1.3.1 Released](</2017/06/23/apache-flink-1.3.1-released/>)

June 23, 2017 -

The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.3 series.

This release includes 50 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.3.0. The list below includes a detailed list of all fixes.

We highly recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.3.1.


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.3.1</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.3.1</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.3.1</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](<http://flink.apache.org/downloads.html>).

###  Bug

  * [[FLINK-6492](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6492>)] - Unclosed DataOutputViewStream in GenericArraySerializerConfigSnapshot#write()
  * [[FLINK-6602](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6602>)] - Table source with defined time attributes allows empty string
  * [[FLINK-6652](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6652>)] - Problem with DelimitedInputFormat
  * [[FLINK-6659](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6659>)] - RocksDBMergeIteratorTest, SavepointITCase leave temporary directories behind
  * [[FLINK-6669](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6669>)] - [Build] Scala style check errror on Windows
  * [[FLINK-6685](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6685>)] - SafetyNetCloseableRegistry is closed prematurely in Task::triggerCheckpointBarrier
  * [[FLINK-6772](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6772>)] - Incorrect ordering of matched state events in Flink CEP
  * [[FLINK-6775](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6775>)] - StateDescriptor cannot be shared by multiple subtasks
  * [[FLINK-6780](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6780>)] - ExternalTableSource should add time attributes in the row type
  * [[FLINK-6783](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6783>)] - Wrongly extracted TypeInformations for WindowedStream::aggregate
  * [[FLINK-6797](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6797>)] - building docs fails with bundler 1.15
  * [[FLINK-6801](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6801>)] - PojoSerializerConfigSnapshot cannot deal with missing Pojo fields
  * [[FLINK-6804](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6804>)] - Inconsistent state migration behaviour between different state backends
  * [[FLINK-6807](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6807>)] - Elasticsearch 5 connector artifact not published to maven
  * [[FLINK-6808](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6808>)] - Stream join fails when checkpointing is enabled
  * [[FLINK-6809](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6809>)] - side outputs documentation: wrong variable name in java example code
  * [[FLINK-6812](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6812>)] - Elasticsearch 5 release artifacts not published to Maven central
  * [[FLINK-6815](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6815>)] - Javadocs don't work anymore in Flink 1.4-SNAPSHOT
  * [[FLINK-6816](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6816>)] - Fix wrong usage of Scala string interpolation in Table API
  * [[FLINK-6833](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6833>)] - Race condition: Asynchronous checkpointing task can fail completed StreamTask
  * [[FLINK-6844](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6844>)] - TraversableSerializer should implement compatibility methods
  * [[FLINK-6848](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6848>)] - Extend the managed state docs with a Scala example
  * [[FLINK-6853](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6853>)] - Migrating from Flink 1.1 fails for FlinkCEP
  * [[FLINK-6869](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6869>)] - Scala serializers do not have the serialVersionUID specified
  * [[FLINK-6875](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6875>)] - Remote DataSet API job submission timing out
  * [[FLINK-6881](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6881>)] - Creating a table from a POJO and defining a time attribute fails
  * [[FLINK-6883](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6883>)] - Serializer for collection of Scala case classes are generated with different anonymous class names in 1.3
  * [[FLINK-6886](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6886>)] - Fix Timestamp field can not be selected in event time case when toDataStream[T], `T` not a `Row` Type.
  * [[FLINK-6896](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6896>)] - Creating a table from a POJO and use table sink to output fail
  * [[FLINK-6899](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6899>)] - Wrong state array size in NestedMapsStateTable
  * [[FLINK-6914](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6914>)] - TrySerializer#ensureCompatibility causes StackOverflowException
  * [[FLINK-6915](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6915>)] - EnumValueSerializer broken
  * [[FLINK-6921](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6921>)] - EnumValueSerializer cannot properly handle appended enum values
  * [[FLINK-6922](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6922>)] - Enum(Value)SerializerConfigSnapshot uses Java serialization to store enum values
  * [[FLINK-6930](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6930>)] - Selecting window start / end on row-based Tumble/Slide window causes NPE
  * [[FLINK-6932](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6932>)] - Update the inaccessible Dataflow Model paper link
  * [[FLINK-6941](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6941>)] - Selecting window start / end on over window causes field not resolve exception
  * [[FLINK-6948](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6948>)] - EnumValueSerializer cannot handle removed enum values

###  Improvement

  * [[FLINK-5354](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-5354>)] - Split up Table API documentation into multiple pages
  * [[FLINK-6038](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6038>)] - Add deep links to Apache Bahir Flink streaming connector documentations
  * [[FLINK-6796](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6796>)] - Allow setting the user code class loader for AbstractStreamOperatorTestHarness
  * [[FLINK-6803](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6803>)] - Add test for PojoSerializer when Pojo changes
  * [[FLINK-6859](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6859>)] - StateCleaningCountTrigger should not delete timer
  * [[FLINK-6929](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6929>)] - Add documentation for Table API OVER windows
  * [[FLINK-6952](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6952>)] - Add link to Javadocs
  * [[FLINK-6748](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6748>)] - Table API / SQL Docs: Table API Page

###  Test

  * [[FLINK-6830](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6830>)] - Add ITTests for savepoint migration from 1.3
  * [[FLINK-6320](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6320>)] - Flakey JobManagerHAJobGraphRecoveryITCase
  * [[FLINK-6744](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6744>)] - Flaky ExecutionGraphSchedulingTest
  * [[FLINK-6913](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-6913>)] - Instable StatefulJobSavepointMigrationITCase.testRestoreSavepoint
